steps.title: Use the two function values
steps.content: The values $h(0)=36$ and $h(1)=35$ give two points on the line: $(0,36)$ and $(1,35)$.

steps.title: Find the slope and intercept
steps.content: The slope is $$m=(35-36)/(1-0)=-1.$$ Since $h(0)=36$, the $y$-intercept is $36$.

steps.title: Write the function
steps.content: A linear function with slope $-1$ and intercept $36$ is $$h(x)=-x+36.$$ A is correct.
